caption: A man wearing a grey, peaked wig, glasses, a white collared shirt with a bowtie, and tan suspenders is recorded in a podcast setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and sits before a black microphone. The background features a wall of framed photographs and a clothing rack with a "LEE" branded garment. On-screen logos include a white and red graphic with the text "PODCAST" and "BOSS TALK JOY". Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing; he begins by raising his right hand toward his head, then lowers it as his facial expression shifts from a neutral gaze to a slight smile while speaking. The camera remains stationary, capturing him from the chest up as he interacts with someone off-screen.
